channel.title: Posts on Luka Giorgadze
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Luka Giorgadze

item.title: Health as an Investment
item.description:
“A healthy man wants a thousand things, a sick man only wants one.”

— Confucius

People often say we have many problems in life - until we get sick. Then we realize we have only one.

Imagine it is the year 2050.

A doctor is sitting in front of you. The room feels quiet and heavy. You hear words you never wanted to hear — you have a serious illness. The biggest reason is not bad luck. It is not genetics. It is your lifestyle.

item.title: How Claude Code Works Under the Hood
item.description: A simple deep dive into how Claude Code works, how it scans your project, uses tools, and interacts with your codebase.

item.title: First Commit
item.description: Thoughts on engineering, entrepreneurship, and navigating the intersection of technology and life.
